author: Omer Bese
name: BESE 288-vocab Novel Tokenizer + Depth Recurrence + Parallel Residuals
summary: BESE two-layer tokenizer (40 base + 248 BPE merges = 288 vocab) shrinks embedding table by ~276KB vs SP1024, funding extra transformer depth. Depth recurrence (3 loops on layers 3-5), parallel residuals, n-gram tilt at eval, compiled NS5 optimizer, batched EMA. 3-seed mean: 1.1531 BPB.
notes: First custom tokenizer submission to the challenge. 3-seed mean with sliding window eval (stride=64) and n-gram prior tilt. BESE's 288 vocab produces ~2x more tokens per byte than SP1024, but the 276KB embedding savings fund depth recurrence and parallel residuals.
